---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a focused improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user problem should this solve?

## Proposed behavior

What should CloudSaver do?

## Scope check

- [ ] Works locally without hosted accounts
- [ ] Does not require uploading file data
- [ ] Does not silently delete or overwrite originals
- [ ] Fits storage audit, duplicate review, reporting, or safe optimization

## Alternatives considered

Describe any workaround or other approach you considered.
